name: Maybe
description: The OS for your personal finances
compose:
name: slashnode-maybe
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/maybe-finance/maybe:0.6.0
    container_name: maybe-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      SELF_HOSTING_ENABLED: 'true'
      PORT: '3063'
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://maybe:maybe@maybe-db:5432/maybe
      RAILS_FORCE_SSL: 'false'
      RAILS_ASSUME_SSL: 'false'
      POSTGRES_DB: maybe
      POSTGRES_USER: maybe
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: maybe
      GOOD_JOB_EXECUTION_MODE: async
      SECRET_KEY_BASE: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      REDIS_URL: redis://maybe-redis:6379/1
    volumes:
      - web_data-rails:/rails/storage
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3063:3063
  worker:
    image: ghcr.io/maybe-finance/maybe:0.6.0
    container_name: maybe-worker
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: bundle exec sidekiq
    depends_on:
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      SELF_HOSTING_ENABLED: 'true'
      PORT: '3063'
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://maybe:maybe@maybe-db:5432/maybe
      RAILS_FORCE_SSL: 'false'
      RAILS_ASSUME_SSL: 'false'
      POSTGRES_DB: maybe
      POSTGRES_USER: maybe
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: maybe
      GOOD_JOB_EXECUTION_MODE: async
      SECRET_KEY_BASE: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      REDIS_URL: redis://maybe-redis:6379/1
  db:
    image: postgres:16
    container_name: maybe-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: maybe
      POSTGRES_USER: maybe
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: maybe
      PGDATA: /var/lib/postgresql/pgdata
    volumes:
      - db_data-postgres:/var/lib/postgresql
  redis:
    image: redis:7.4.2
    container_name: maybe-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-rails:
    name: slashnode-maybe_web_data-rails
  db_data-postgres:
    name: slashnode-maybe_db_data-postgres
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-maybe_redis_data-redis
